markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and resolve critical website blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Sales Page Blocker:** Inability to edit sales collateral pages (e.g., pricing) is blocking sales. Katya will investigate access via Sanity or Raze; Alex will provide links to the live and draft pages for context.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [**Traffic Surging:** Total site impressions are spiking, a normal pre-click indicator. The focus now is optimizing titles/meta descriptions to improve the click-through rate (CTR).](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** Weekly syncs will become bi-weekly to shift focus from updates to strategy. Alex will provide case study details to unblock the creation of high-value content.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [**Partner Content:** A "partner content swap" is planned for LinkedIn. Katya will provide Understory's SEO/AEO performance data for Alex to create a transparent, technical case study.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)

## Topics

### Sales Page Blocker

  - [**Problem:** Understory cannot edit its sales collateral landing pages (e.g., GTM, pricing), which are hosted on an unknown platform (possibly Bruxelles) and managed by a former contact (Ilya).](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [**Impact:** Sales collateral is sent to prospects with outdated information, including incorrect pricing.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [**Resolution:**](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [Katya will consult Raze to find an access solution, potentially via Sanity.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [Alex will send links to both the live page and the draft page with desired edits to provide full context for the investigation.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)

### Content Performance & Optimization

  - [**Traffic Trends:**](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [**Impressions:** Total site impressions are spiking, a normal pre-click indicator.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [**Clicks:** Click volume is not yet correlating with impression growth.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is expected. Impressions rise first as Google recognizes content value; clicks follow as engagement builds, typically spiking around the 3-month mark.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)
  - [**Optimization Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
      - [**Titles & Meta Descriptions:** Optimize to improve CTR.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
      - [**Content Themes:** Prioritize practical, problem-solving articles, as initial data shows interest in topics like "all-bound marketing" and "creative fatigue."](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [**Referral Channels:**](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [**SEO:** Standard search traffic is growing.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [**AEO (Answer Engine Optimization):** Referrals from LLMs (e.g., Grok, ChatGPT) are increasing, validating the strategy of writing longer, descriptive snippets for AI.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)

### Content Production & Strategy

  - [**Blog Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [The first podcast article is live.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [Three more podcast articles will be published this week.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [Once three are live, the blog will be updated with a dedicated "Podcast Episodes" category and dropdown.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [**Case Studies:**](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
      - [Production is paused because the AI-generated draft was generic.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
      - [**Blocker:** A lack of specific client details.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Resolution:** Alex will provide key points from past client work to enable the creation of authentic, high-value case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**LinkedIn SEO:**](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
      - [**Question:** Can LinkedIn profiles be optimized for search (e.g., "go-to-market strategies") to drive pipeline?](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
      - [**Action:** Katya will consult the GrowthX team for actionable advice.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)

### Partner Content Swap

  - [**Goal:** Create a transparent, technical LinkedIn case study on the Understory \<\> GrowthX partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [**Context:** This is a "partner content swap" with GrowthX's Jason, who will also create content about working with Understory.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [**Requirement:** Alex needs specific, "in-the-weeds" data points (e.g., SEO/AEO lift, meetings booked) to create the content.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
  - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)
      - [**High-Level Teaser:** Katya to provide data by EOW or Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
      - [**Detailed Data:** Katya to provide by next Wednesday or early December.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)

      - [Provide Alex with high-level partnership data by EOW/Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/3xQfegG8zA-MrisK3hyKXxSyRcs9zz3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
